transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigation, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, my doctor said she'd send a referral to a cardiologist, but I don't know if it went through yet.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can check that for you. Can I get your name and date of birth, please?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sure, it's Daniel Foster, born March 4th, 1972.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks, Daniel. I see a referral from Dr. Reyes to Dr. Whitfield at Lakeside Cardiology, submitted yesterday and approved this morning.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Oh good. Do I need to call them myself to book an appointment?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, you'll want to call Lakeside Cardiology directly at 555-201-3390 and mention the referral number, which is R-88214.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Got it, R-88214. Will they already have my insurance info?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: They should, since it's attached to the referral, but it's a good idea to have your insurance card ready just in case.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's really helpful. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Daniel. Is there anything else I can help with today?
